description: Comprehensive OpenClaw dashboard combining the Overview panels (token usage, message flow, queue & session health, error logs) with all panels from OpenClaw — Error Monitoring (agent run errors, error rate, errors by model/channel/provider, slowest operations, errored span detail).
title: OpenClaw — Full Comprehensive Dashboard

filter.expression: openclaw.channel in $channel AND openclaw.model in $model AND openclaw.provider in $provider
openclaw.token = 'input' AND openclaw.channel in $channel AND openclaw.provider in $provider
openclaw.token = 'output' AND openclaw.channel in $channel AND openclaw.provider in $provider

widgets.description: All panels imported from OpenClaw — Error Monitoring
widgets.title: Error Monitoring

widgets.description: Count of openclaw-gateway spans with an error in the selected range.
widgets.title: Total Agent Run Errors

widgets.description: Errored spans as a percentage of all openclaw-gateway spans.
widgets.title: Run Error Rate (%)

widgets.description: All openclaw-gateway spans (run/message volume) in range.
widgets.title: Total Agent Runs

widgets.description: openclaw.message.processed counter total, grouped by outcome. Non-completed outcomes indicate failed/aborted message runs.
widgets.title: Messages Processed (by outcome)

widgets.description: Time series of errored openclaw-gateway spans. Watch for spikes.
widgets.title: Agent Run Errors Over Time

widgets.description: Errored spans / total spans per interval, expressed as a percentage.
widgets.title: Run Error Rate % Over Time

widgets.description: Errored spans grouped by openclaw.model — surfaces which model is associated with the most failed runs.
widgets.title: Errors by Model

widgets.description: Errored spans grouped by openclaw.channel and openclaw.provider.
widgets.title: Errors by Channel & Provider

widgets.description: p95 span duration grouped by operation name. Slow operations often precede timeouts and errors.
widgets.title: Slowest Operations (p95 duration)

widgets.description: Detailed list of the most recent errored openclaw-gateway spans — drill into individual failed runs by session, message and model.
widgets.title: Recent Errored Spans (detail)
